title: conyza auriculifera
intro: Conyza auriculifera, also known as earless fleabane, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Conyza auriculifera has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, providing benefits such as pain relief, improved digestion, and boosted immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various methods of consumption and utilization of its medicinal properties.
